creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
(In reply to Vurefozu from comment #43)
> Harald Schmalzbauer 2025-03-15 14:56:30 MSK
> This is on stable/14 (1402504):
> drm-61-kmod-6.1.128.1402000_2  DRM drivers modules

Nah, I've just overwritten OSVERSION to fake 14.2-RELEASE.  While there is a small chance that ABI extensions would be picked up by ports building tools (meson,auto* etc.), one can usually install 14/stable build ports on older 14/stable machines or 14.x release.
By default I not only need to confirm each package, pkg(1) defaults to no (see also https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=285194 for another approach to handle such cases).
